title: Beef and Pot Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese-inspired stir-fry made with tender beef, crunchy vegetables, and savory pot sauce. Serve hot over a bed of rice for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Pot sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade chili bean paste

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
4. Add onion and bell pepper to skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms to skillet and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Add pot sauce to skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add cooked beef back into skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
8. Season with soy sauce, salt, and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot over a bed of rice.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds, if desired.
